name: Aubergines a La Toulousaine (Eggplant a La Toulouse)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggplant into 1/2-inch thick slices and peel.
2. Place slices on paper towels; sprinkle each generously with salt. Let stand for 30 minutes, then blot dry with paper towels.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F.
4. Saute eggplant in 1/4 cup salad oil until golden. Add more oil as needed.
5. Cut tomatoes into 1/2-inch thick slices and saute in the same skillet.
6. In a 10x6x2 inch baking dish, arrange eggplant and tomatoes in alternate layers (total of 4 layers), sprinkling each layer with 1/4 teaspoon salt and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
7. Combine bread cubes with parsley, garlic, 1 tablespoon salad oil, and cheese. Toss well.
8. Sprinkle the combined mixture over the top layer.
9. Bake for 20 minutes or until the bread cubes are golden and the eggplant is tender.
